# Soft3 Tool150 Grep6 Contract

## Soft 3
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.03 with quality bias floor 0.02 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 150
tool result budgets default to 150 chars with 2-char previews for denser reclaim

## Grep 6
Grep head defaults to 6 lines for denser search results

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/footer vitest
